specs.title: cp-000: Main layout uses a 256px left sidebar w-64 flex editor column a collapsible Rese
cp-001: Height fills viewport h-calc100vh-7rem
cp-002: Right panel can be replaced by the Reference Sidebar or Comment Sidebar
cp-003: All columns visible on desktop
cp-004: Layout responsive at different viewport widths
cp-005: Editable title input at top of sidebar
cp-006: Title updates on change and triggers save
cp-007: Title input has no placeholder in the current implementation
cp-008: Write button switches to DraftWrite mode
cp-009: Learn button switches to LearnGuide mode
cp-010: Active mode button is visually highlighted
cp-011: Mode persists during session
cp-012: Dropdown shows users projects if multiple exist
cp-013: Selecting a project switches document context
cp-014: Document content loads for selected project
cp-015: My Library link navigates to library
cp-016: Literature Search link navigates to research
cp-017: Header shows References X with count
cp-018: Top 5 cited references displayed
cp-019: View all X references expandable link
cp-020: Empty state Use CmdShiftC to add citations
cp-021: Reference preview cards are display-only in the left sidebar summary
cp-022: Usage bar displayed at sidebar bottom
cp-023: Shows tokens used vs tokens limit
cp-024: Bar fills proportionally to usage
cp-025: Falls back to 0 50000 if usage stats fail to load
cp-026: Header renders when isLearnMode is false
cp-027: Three AI intensity buttons displayed
cp-028: Active intensity button visually highlighted
cp-029: Switching intensity updates AI behavior
cp-030: Default intensity is collaborate
cp-031: Header renders when isLearnMode is true
cp-032: Emerald green header with text Guide Mode I wont write for you Ill teach you how
cp-033: Select document type default text
cp-034: Clicking opens picker with 7 document types
